'''zapolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabottle|seabottle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabottle|seabottle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zapolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæpeleth|zæpeleth]] || [[word:zæpelej|zæpelej]] || [[word:zæpelesh|zæpelesh]] || [[word:zæpele|zæpele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zapopoloth|zapopoloth]] || [[word:zapopoloj|zapopoloj]] || [[word:zapopolosh|zapopolosh]] || [[word:zapopolo|zapopolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zapoloth|zapoloth]] || [[word:zapoloj|zapoloj]] || [[word:zapolosh|zapolosh]] || [[word:zapolo|zapolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zapofloth|zapofloth]] || [[word:zapofloj|zapofloj]] || [[word:zapoflosh|zapoflosh]] || [[word:zapoflof|zapoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zapolotho|zapolotho]] || [[word:zapolojo|zapolojo]] || [[word:zapolosho|zapolosho]] || [[word:zapoloko|zapoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zapoloth|zapoloth]] || [[word:zapoloj|zapoloj]] || [[word:zapolosh|zapolosh]] || [[word:zapolo|zapolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zapolothol|zapolothol]] || [[word:zapolojol|zapolojol]] || [[word:zapoloshol|zapoloshol]] || [[word:zapolokol|zapolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zapolothotho|zapolothotho]] || [[word:zapolojojo|zapolojojo]] || [[word:zapoloshosho|zapoloshosho]] || [[word:zapoloko|zapoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zapolothon|zapolothon]] || [[word:zapolojon|zapolojon]] || [[word:zapoloshon|zapoloshon]] || [[word:zapolokon|zapolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zapolothoro|zapolothoro]] || [[word:zapolojoro|zapolojoro]] || [[word:zapoloshoro|zapoloshoro]] || [[word:zapolokoro|zapolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
